name: improve-ssh-import-workflow
title: Improve SSH command import workflow
description: Make SSH command import follow normal paste behavior, parse visibly, and assign imported forwards to the right host/target or create the missing host.
creator: brink
notes: Completed SSH import workflow: normal Command+V and visible paste now work, stale parsed-zero state is gone, parsed destinations select matching SSH targets globally, existing hosts can receive a new SSH target, unmatched destinations default to a new host, and bridge storage rejects missing or cross-host rule target references.
